title: davallia bipinnata
intro: Davallia bipinnata, also known as the Davallia fern or Water Fern, is a type of evergreen fern that belongs to the Davalliaceae family. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Davallia bipinnata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
